content.thinking:
Interesting! The logs show:
- crdb-cluster-0: `status: initialized new cluster` and `nodeID: 1`
- crdb-cluster-1: `status: initialized new node, joined pre-existing cluster` and `nodeID: 3`

Let me check crdb-cluster-2 as well, and also check if the cluster is actually SQL-ready or if there's still something missing.

The task says "pods are running but the cluster is not forming" and "join/advertise errors when attempting to contact peer nodes." But the logs show the cluster already has nodes joined. 

I need to verify that all three nodes are actually part of the cluster and check whether SQL connections are working. Let me look at the StatefulSet configuration to see how the nodes are configured, especially their join flags.

content.text: Pods are up and pods 0 and 1 show joined status. Let me check pod 2 and the StatefulSet configuration.

input.description: Get StatefulSet spec to inspect join flags and command

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"},"name":"crdb-cluster","namespace":"cockroachdb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"serviceName":"crdb-cluster","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/instance":"crdb-cluster","app.kubernetes.io/name":"cockroachdb"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-ecx","exec /cockroach/cockroach start \\\n  --insecure \\\n  --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \\\n  --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \\\n  --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \\\n  --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \\\n  --cache=25% \\\n  --max-sql-memory=25%\n"],"env":[{"name":"COCKROACH_CHANNEL","value":"kubernetes-insecure"}],"image":"cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0","imagePullPolicy":"IfNotPresent","livenessProbe":{"httpGet":{"path":"/health","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":30,"periodSeconds":5},"name":"cockroachdb","ports":[{"containerPort":26257,"name":"grpc"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"http"}],"readinessProbe":{"failureThreshold":2,"httpGet":{"path":"/health?ready=1","port":"http"},"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/cockroach/cockroach-data","name":"datadir"}]}],"serviceAccountName":"crdb-cluster-sa","terminationGracePeriodSeconds":60}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"datadir"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-01T22:37:45Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
    app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  name: crdb-cluster
  namespace: cockroachdb
  resourceVersion: "1874007"
  uid: a640c06f-a71e-4d62-83c4-971cc47ad8a1
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
      app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
  serviceName: crdb-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crdb-cluster
        app.kubernetes.io/name: cockroachdb
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -ecx
        - |
          exec /cockroach/cockroach start \
            --insecure \
            --advertise-host=$(hostname -f) \
            --http-addr=0.0.0.0:8080 \
            --listen-addr=0.0.0.0:26257 \
            --join=crdb-cluster-0.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-1.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257,crdb-cluster-2.crdb-cluster.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local:26257 \
            --cache=25% \
            --max-sql-memory=25%
        env:
        - name: COCKROACH_CHANNEL
          value: kubernetes-insecure
        image: cockroachdb/cockroach:v24.1.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 3
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        name: cockroachdb
        ports:
        - containerPort: 26257
          name: grpc
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 2
          httpGet:
            path: /health?ready=1
            port: http
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /cockroach/cockroach-data
          name: datadir
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: crdb-cluster-sa
      serviceAccountName: crdb-cluster-sa
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: datadir
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  availableReplicas: 3
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 3
  currentRevision: crdb-cluster-69ddbb6d6c
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 3
  replicas: 3
  updateRevision: crdb-cluster-69ddbb6d6c
  updatedReplicas: 3

content.thinking:
The StatefulSet looks correctly configured with proper `--join` flags listing all 3 nodes. The logs show:
- Pod 0 (nodeID 1): "initialized new cluster" 
- Pod 1 (nodeID 3): "initialized new node, joined pre-existing cluster"
- Pod 2 (nodeID 2): "initialized new node, joined pre-existing cluster"

This actually means the cluster was already initialized! The `cockroach init` command was apparently already run (or pod 0 acted as the bootstrap node). All three pods are showing clusterID `6e82677d-af79-4465-ac5e-cf31a09c2821` and joined successfully.
But wait—the task description says the cluster hasn't been initialized yet, though the logs show all nodes have joined with a cluster ID. This is contradictory. Let me reconsider whether these logs are current or from an earlier state.

I notice pod 0's log contains `status: initialized new cluster`, which is the message CockroachDB outputs when `cockroach init` has been executed. I need to verify whether that command was already run or if I'm looking at stale logs. Let me try connecting to the SQL shell to check the actual state.

content.text: The config looks correct — all 3 nodes show joined with the same clusterID. Let me check if `cockroach init` has already been run and whether SQL connections work.
